g.text: Relational Algebra (WHAT) to Machine Execution (HOW) — Cost-Based Selection

ol.li: Transformation: Generate equivalent physical candidates (PhysicalProperty enforced).
Cost Estimation: Apply formula: Cost = (W1 * CPU) + (W2 * IO) + (W3 * Net).
Pruning: Use Dynamic Programming or Cascades (Volcano) to discard high-cost sub-trees.

g.title: Uses Statistics (Histograms, MCV) to select Physical Implementation

g.text: Hash Implementation: Memory intensive, O(N) average case
Sort Implementation: Disk-spill friendly, best for large sets
Index vs Seq: Selected by I/O cost model + Page Statistics
O(M log M + N log N)

g.title: Uses Statistics (Histograms, MCV) to select Physical Implementation
